creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
If uhidd is installed and there is no uhidd_enable line in rc.conf there are complaints in /var/log/messages:

zeus root: /usr/local/etc/rc.d/uhidd: WARNING: $uhidd_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).

Fix: 

- Set default value for uhidd_enabled in rc script

Submitted by: Chris Rees (utisoft@gmail.com)



http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/uhidd-rc-default.diff
How-To-Repeat: Install sysutils/uhidd-0.2.0 and run the rc script with no uhidd_enable line in rc.conf.
